context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements outbound calls using the Twilio integration with proper dynamic variable personalization, per-call conversation config overrides, and correct API method and parameter usage.

checklist.name: Correct outbound call method
checklist.description: Uses client.conversational_ai.twilio.outbound_call() (Python) or client.conversationalAi.twilio.outboundCall() (JavaScript) — not a generic HTTP request or a different method

checklist.name: Required parameters present
checklist.description: Each outbound call includes all three required parameters: agent_id, agent_phone_number_id, and to_number

checklist.name: dynamic_variables passed
checklist.description: customer-specific data (e.g., name, balance, appointment time) is passed via dynamic_variables inside conversation_initiation_client_data — not hardcoded in the prompt or first_message string directly

checklist.name: conversation_config_override used
checklist.description: Per-call customization (first_message, language, or voice) is set via conversation_config_override inside conversation_initiation_client_data — not by updating the agent itself before each call

checklist.name: Template syntax in prompt
checklist.description: The agent's system prompt or first_message uses {{variable_name}} double-brace template syntax to reference the dynamic variables

checklist.name: Error handling per call
checklist.description: Each outbound call attempt is wrapped in try/except (Python) or try/catch (JavaScript) so a failure for one customer does not abort the entire campaign

checklist.name: Batch loop processing
checklist.description: Multiple customers are processed in a loop (not a separate hardcoded call per customer)

checklist.name: Conversation ID logged
checklist.description: The conversation_id from the response is printed or logged after each successful call

checklist.name: call_recording_enabled included
checklist.description: call_recording_enabled=True (Python) or callRecordingEnabled: true (JavaScript) is set on the outbound call

checklist.name: Correct ElevenLabs client init
checklist.description: Uses ElevenLabs() / ElevenLabsClient() initialized from environment variable (ELEVENLABS_API_KEY) rather than hardcoding the key in source
